name: engineering
description: BeSpunky engineering skills and agents. Today: architect-mentality (the stack-agnostic mindset of a great architect - black-box thinking, model the missing concept, refuse false tradeoffs, go the extra mile) and architecture-first (the operational discipline - solve through design not patches, fix the root cause, design + confirm refactors first). Growing to cover advanced TypeScript, Angular architecture, Nx, and general software-development practices.
